Petition To Determine Amount Of Expenses Of Administration Attributable To Real Property And For Order Directing Title Company To Pay Same To Estate From Excrow Prior To Paying Encumbrances On Said Real Property
Off Calendar May-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Myers for Ronald Homsher.

The Court stated that everything was in order and questioned if the amount of $10,796.00 for Attorney's fees and commissions included the previous request for costs in the amount of $1,582.00. Mr. Myers stated that it was not included and that he needed to add a line in the order. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
